course_description.overview: Challenging 150 km road sportive through the Transylvanian highlands near the Făgăraș Mountains, featuring rolling terrain and significant climbs with stunning Carpathian scenery.

key_segments.name: Initial Rollers
key_segments.description: Gentle undulations warming up through rural Transylvanian landscapes.

key_segments.name: Făgăraș Foothill Climb
key_segments.description: Major ascent into the highlands with panoramic views of peaks.

key_segments.name: Descent and Final Push
key_segments.description: Fast descent followed by rolling finish back to Sibiu.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Demands strong climbing ability with sustained efforts in the highlands; rewarding for those seeking epic scenery and moderate suffering.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Sibiu International Airport (SBZ) or Bucharest (OTP) then 4-hour drive/train; good road access from major EU cities.
logistics.accommodation: Abundant hotels in historic Sibiu old town; book early for event weekend.
logistics.registration_details: Online via official site, €50-80 entry fee; multiple distances often available.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bike rental shops in Sibiu; fly with bike or rent locally; roads bike-friendly.
logistics.local_considerations: Warm summer weather; bear-aware in highlands; English widely spoken in tourist areas.

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic Transylvanian highlands challenge with climbs and culture.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Ambitious amateurs seeking beauty and climbs in Eastern Europe.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for value, scenery, and unique location.
pro_tips: Start hydration early in summer heat.
Combine with nearby Transfăgărășan Highway ride.
